---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for AgentKitForge Core
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

What workflow does this support?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior, CLI shape, schema shape, or API shape.

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Core validation
- [ ] Agent Kit package/spec
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Exporters/adapters
- [ ] Prepared Prompts
- [ ] Context Builder
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation

## Compatibility

Does this require an Agent Kit schema change or breaking behavior change?

## Notes

Marketplace, backend, infrastructure, and desktop app UI features are out of scope for this repository.
